Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First parse the normative rules strict Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ordering rules Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Inform Applicant after Loan Decision If approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case If rejected do not finalize documentation before closing

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case So all good No normative violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Desiderata Credit Check within 24h Received 0900 credit check 0930 same day within 24h ok Inform applicant within 48h of decision Decision at 1100 inform at 1300 same day within 48h ok

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Risk Assessment 0820 No prior Credit Check This violates ordering Credit Check must be before Risk Assessment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After decision rejected they performed Finalize Documentation at 1000 That is not allowed if rejected do not finalize documentation before closing So that is a normative violation

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The log for case2 does not include an Inform Applicant activity According to normative rules after Loan Decision the applicant must be informed So that is also a normative violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Credit Check This is more than 24 hours after receipt So desideratum violation But normative no strict time constraint so it is okay

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Inform Applicant This is more than 48 hours after decision So desideratum violation

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: No Follow up Call desideratum missing

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: We can say it is a procedural error

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Could be due to a system glitch that allowed the risk assessment to be started before the credit check was completed or an employee misunderstanding the process Possibly the credit check was done but recorded later

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Perhaps the decision was communicated verbally or via other means not captured in the log But the log is the event log so if it is not there it is missing Could be an oversight

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Possibly the employee was following a checklist that said finalize documentation for all cases regardless of outcome Or the system automatically triggered documentation finalization upon case closure

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Credit check delay could be due to high workload missing documentation or the credit bureau took longer to respond Inform applicant delay could be due to waiting for finalization of documentation before informing
